stemHtml: The ICAO Contracting States establish border controls for the entry and departure of persons – Regarding the entry requirements for crew arriving on duty on an international flight…

options.a: States shall establish measures to expedite inspection of crew members and their baggage.
options.b: States shall ensure that the Flight Crew Licence is accepted as a valid document of identity.
options.c: Crew members are subject to the same entry requirements as passengers.
options.d: Crew must be in uniform in order to be allowed temporary entry into the Contracting State.
